revision.comment: First try
Moved some of the material from the inner templates to this one.
revision.text: {{{1}}} ({{{2}}}{{call|=nihongo/rom|{{{3}}}=nihongo/norom|1={{{1}}}|2={{{2}}}|3={{{3}}}}})

revision.comment: Added help link.
revision.text: {{{1}}} ({{{2}}}{{call|=nihongo/rom|{{{3}}}=nihongo/norom|1={{{1}}}|2={{{2}}}|3={{{3}}}}} [[Template:Nihongo/Help|?]])

revision.comment: help leaf icon
look, now it isn't obnoxious anymore
Just adding a comma.
Remove comma; this has been discussed and we decided not to use the comma. Please don't put it back without discussion.
fix html
converting using {{qif}} instead of {{call}}; add "extra" parameter to include literal translations or birth–death dates
rem nihongo comma stuff, it needs to be a normal comma
comma will show between Hepburn and extra when both parameters are present
convert {{qif}} to {{#if}}
+cat
fixed <noinclude>
+it
Adding navigational boxes category using [[Wikipedia:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
Accidental change; self-revert
modifying templae... looks better this way I believe.
removing what appears to be unnecesary serries of <span>s.

revision.text: {{{1}}} ([[Japanese language|Japanese]]: {{{2}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}| - ''{{{3}}}''| - ''{{{1}}}''}} sup>[[Help:Japanese|?]]</sup>{{#if:{{{4| {{{extra|}}} }}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}}|,| }} {{{4| {{{extra}}} }}}}})<noinclude> [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]][[it:Nihongo]] </noinclude>

{{{1}}} ([[Japanese language|Japanese]]: {{{2}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}| ''{{{3}}}'' | - ''{{{1}}}''}} <sup>[[Help:Japanese|?]]</sup>{{#if:{{{4| {{{extra|}}} }}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}}|,| }} {{{4| {{{extra}}} }}}}})<noinclude> [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]][[it:Nihongo]] </noinclude>

'''{{{1}}}''' ([[Japanese language|Japanese]]: {{{2}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}| ''{{{3}}}'' | - ''{{{1}}}'' }} <sup>[[Help:Japanese|?]]</sup>{{#if:{{{4| {{{extra|}}} }}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}}|,| }} {{{4| {{{extra}}} }}}}})<noinclude> [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]][[it:Nihongo]] </noinclude>

{{{1}}} ([[Japanese language|Japanese]]: {{{2}}} - {{#if:{{{3|}}}| ''{{{3}}}'' | ''{{{1}}}'' }} <sup>[[Help:Japanese|?]]</sup>{{#if:{{{4| {{{extra|}}} }}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}}|,| }} {{{4| {{{extra}}} }}}}})<noinclude> [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]][[it:Nihongo]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: reverting to preserve hundreds of article damaged
usage, please update!
It's "Romaji", not "Romanji"
[[fr:Template:Nihongo]]. French Wikipedia will take this template too
+ru
zh:
rv
If someone prints a page with this template in it, how can they follow the little question mark link?
getting rid of the question mark
both classes (this should hide it for experienced users)
space->nbsp
Removed extra ]] to fix a typo in the template
reverted, second time. do not make major revisions to a widely used template without a discussion first
moved the underline below the ? to immediately below it by changing a-sup to sup-a
new extra param, makes listing some anime character names a little easier
JS: Reverted [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalism]] by [[Special:Contributions/202.75.128.24|202.75.128.24]] to last version by TheFarix. Please do not compromise the integrity of pages.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/61.60.91.61|61.60.91.61]] ([[User talk:61.60.91.61|talk]]) to last version by Dcooper
Protected Template:Nihongo: insertion of vandalism images [edit=autoconfirmed:move=autoconfirmed]
Unprotected Template:Nihongo: unprotect since Bulbasaur's time on main page is up
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Skiler|Skiler]] ([[User talk:Skiler|talk]]) to last version by Joelr31
JS: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/SMoore88|SMoore88]] to last version by Ricky81682
JS: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/SMoore88|SMoore88]] to last version by Steel359
JS: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Yoyo235|Yoyo235]] to last version by Steel359
Protected Template:Nihongo: vandalism from new accounts [edit=autoconfirmed:move=autoconfirmed]
+{{sprotected}} (in the noinclude section)
Protected Template:Nihongo: Over 5000 uses, used for image vandalism [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
semi=>{{Protected template}}
Add to [[:Category:Multilingual support templates]]
chinese interwiki fix and sorting by {{PAGENAME}} in cat - per talk page requests
Replacing zh interwiki
adding MoS link
switched to /doc
change ? to Help
space for ease of reading (this is a test)
back to the July version: see discussion page
replace ? with image
spacing
fix
ahhh this looks terrible
reworked per request on talk page
updating code per talk page request
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | (}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{#if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | [[Help:Japanese|?]]}}{{#if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}}}}{{{2|}}} | ,}} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | )}}{{#if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: rm line break
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | (}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{#if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | [[Help:Japanese|?]]}}{{#if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}}}}{{{2|}}} | ,}} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | )}}{{#if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: space

revision.comment: to stop question mark printing, per talk page request

revision.comment: one forced space too many.
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | (}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{#if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Japanese|?]]}}{{#if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}}}}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | )}}{{#if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: force a space here though.
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | (}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{#if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Japanese|?]]}}{{#if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}}}}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | )}}{{#if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: sync from sandbox (readability spaces (since Farix demonstrated that whitespace has no effect on template limits))
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Japanese|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: modifying
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Japanese|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: update link
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: formatting
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: [[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 309733676 by [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|Nihonjoe]] ([[User talk:Nihonjoe|talk]]) disputed; see talk
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: remove {{pp-template}} since included in {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add these articles with this cat to [[Category:Articles containing Japanese language text]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing Japanese language text]]}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: was eating a space. moving. (this is the template:fix bug, I believe....)
revision.text: {{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ( }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} | {{{2}}} }}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{ #if: {{{3|}}} | {{ #if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}} }} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}} |[[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] }}{{ #if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{ #if: {{ #if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}} }}{{{2|}}} |, }} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}} }}{{ #if: {{{2|}}}{{ #if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | ) }}{{ #if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}||[[Category:Articles containing Japanese language text]]}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: Sync with sandbox per talk page request
rem xml:lang- no longer passed by MediaWiki, but automatically added when lang is defined
update cat per [[WP:CFDS]]
redundant wrapper <span>; place classes directly in <sup>
add the ja-Latn-alalc97 language tag to the romanisation per protected edit request by [[User:JohnBlackburne]]

Changed protection level of Template:Nihongo: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Revert per talk
remove leading and/or trailing spaces from unnamed parameters - tested first in /sandbox and /testcases
rm spans that serve no purpose any longer
lang=ja definitely serves a purpose as far as I know. Undid revision 777092144 by [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|Nihonjoe]] ([[User talk:Nihonjoe|talk]])
rm irrelevant classes per UTF-8
change placement of ?
remove question mark
synch from sandbox; see [[Template talk:Nihongo#implementing nihongo and nihongo3 with module:lang|talk]];
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Lang/utilities|nihongo}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: use [[Module:Nihongo]];
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Nihongo|nihongo}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Nihongo|nihongo}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | (}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | {{lang|ja|{{{2}}}}} }}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{#if: {{{3|}}} | {{#if: {{{2|}}} | , }}{{{3}}}}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}} | [[Help:Japanese|?]]}}{{#if: {{{extra|{{{4|}}} }}} | {{#if: {{#if: {{{3|}}}| {{{1|}}}}}{{{2|}}} | ,}} {{{extra|{{{4}}} }}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}{{{4|}}} | )}}{{#if: {{{extra2|{{{5|}}} }}} | {{{extra2|{{{5}}} }}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}
